/**
 * ORCHESTRATOR CORE v2
 * Redis-backed orchestration engine with persistent state.
 * Survives server restarts. Supports horizontal scaling.
 */

import { EventEmitter } from 'events';
import { db } from '../db/connection';
import { devices, alerts, jobs, telemetry, auditLogs } from '../db/schema';
import { eq, and, lt, sql } from 'drizzle-orm';
import { logger } from './logger';
import { redis, isRedisConnected, cacheGet, cacheSet, cacheDel } from './redis';

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface DeviceCommand {
  id: string;
  deviceId: string;
  tenantId: string;
  type: 'shell_execute' | 'reboot' | 'shutdown' | 'update_config' | 'file_transfer' | 'diagnostics' | 'ota_update';
  payload: Record<string, any>;
  status: 'queued' | 'sent' | 'executing' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'timeout';
  result?: CommandResult;
  createdAt: string;
  sentAt?: string;
  completedAt?: string;
  timeout: number;
}

export interface CommandResult {
  exitCode?: number;
  stdout?: string;
  stderr?: string;
  data?: any;
  duration: number;
}

export interface ConnectedDevice {
  deviceId: string;
  tenantId: string;
  connectedAt: string;
  lastHeartbeat: string;
  agentVersion: string;
  capabilities: string[];
}

// ─── Redis Key Prefixes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const KEYS = {
  deviceOnline: (id: string) => `orch:device:online:${id}`,
  commandQueue: (deviceId: string) => `orch:cmdqueue:${deviceId}`,
  activeCommand: (cmdId: string) => `orch:cmd:active:${cmdId}`,
  shadow: (deviceId: string) => `orch:shadow:${deviceId}`,
  commandHistory: (deviceId: string) => `orch:cmd:history:${deviceId}`,
  jobLock: (jobId: string) => `orch:job:lock:${jobId}`,
  telemetryBuffer: 'orch:telemetry:buffer',
};

// ─── Orchestrator Engine ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class OrchestratorEngine extends EventEmitter {
  private connectedDevices = new Map<string, ConnectedDevice>();
  private activeCommands = new Map<string, DeviceCommand>();
  private telemetryBuffer: any[] = [];
  private flushTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
  private retentionTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
  private jobConcurrency = 5; // max parallel job device executions

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.setMaxListeners(100);
    this.startTelemetryFlusher();
    this.startRetentionCleanup();
    logger.info('🎛️  Orchestrator Engine v2 initialized (Redis-backed)');
  }

  // ─── Device Connection Management ────────────────────────────────────────

  async registerDevice(deviceId: string, tenantId: string, agentVersion: string, capabilities: string[] = []) {
    const device: ConnectedDevice = {
      deviceId,
      tenantId,
      connectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      lastHeartbeat: new Date().toISOString(),
      agentVersion,
      capabilities,
    };
    this.connectedDevices.set(deviceId, device);

    // Persist to Redis
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.set(KEYS.deviceOnline(deviceId), JSON.stringify(device), 'EX', 120);
    }

    this.emit('device:connected', device);
    logger.info({ deviceId, agentVersion }, 'Device connected');

    // Update DB
    db.update(devices)
      .set({ status: 'online', lastSeen: new Date(), lastHeartbeat: new Date() })
      .where(eq(devices.id, deviceId))
      .catch(err => logger.error({ err, deviceId }, 'DB update failed'));

    // Flush queued commands from Redis
    await this.flushCommandQueue(deviceId);

    return device;
  }

  async disconnectDevice(deviceId: string) {
    const device = this.connectedDevices.get(deviceId);
    if (device) {
      this.connectedDevices.delete(deviceId);
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.del(KEYS.deviceOnline(deviceId));
      }
      this.emit('device:disconnected', { deviceId, tenantId: device.tenantId });
      logger.info({ deviceId }, 'Device disconnected');

      db.update(devices)
        .set({ status: 'offline', lastSeen: new Date() })
        .where(eq(devices.id, deviceId))
        .catch(() => {});
    }
  }

  isDeviceOnline(deviceId: string): boolean {
    return this.connectedDevices.has(deviceId);
  }

  getConnectedDevices(): ConnectedDevice[] {
    return Array.from(this.connectedDevices.values());
  }

  getConnectedCount(): number {
    return this.connectedDevices.size;
  }

  // ─── Command Dispatch (Redis-persisted queue) ────────────────────────────

  async dispatchCommand(deviceId: string, tenantId: string, type: DeviceCommand['type'], payload: Record<string, any>, timeout = 30000): Promise<DeviceCommand> {
    const command: DeviceCommand = {
      id: `cmd-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`,
      deviceId,
      tenantId,
      type,
      payload,
      status: 'queued',
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      timeout,
    };

    if (this.isDeviceOnline(deviceId)) {
      command.status = 'sent';
      command.sentAt = new Date().toISOString();
      this.activeCommands.set(command.id, command);

      // Persist active command to Redis
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.set(KEYS.activeCommand(command.id), JSON.stringify(command), 'EX', Math.ceil(timeout / 1000) + 30);
      }

      this.emit('command:dispatch', command);
      logger.info({ commandId: command.id, deviceId, type }, 'Command dispatched');

      // Timeout handler
      setTimeout(() => this.handleCommandTimeout(command.id), timeout);
    } else {
      // Queue in Redis for when device reconnects
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.rpush(KEYS.commandQueue(deviceId), JSON.stringify(command));
        await redis.expire(KEYS.commandQueue(deviceId), 86400); // 24h TTL
      }
      logger.info({ commandId: command.id, deviceId, type }, 'Command queued (device offline)');
    }

    // Audit log (fire and forget)
    db.insert(auditLogs).values({
      tenantId,
      action: 'execute_command',
      resource: 'device',
      resourceId: deviceId,
      details: { commandId: command.id, type, payload: Object.keys(payload) },
      ipAddress: '127.0.0.1',
    }).catch(() => {});

    return command;
  }

  async completeCommand(commandId: string, result: CommandResult): Promise<DeviceCommand | null> {
    const command = this.activeCommands.get(commandId);
    if (!command) {
      // Try Redis
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        const cached = await redis.get(KEYS.activeCommand(commandId));
        if (cached) {
          const cmd = JSON.parse(cached) as DeviceCommand;
          cmd.status = result.exitCode === 0 || !result.exitCode ? 'completed' : 'failed';
          cmd.result = result;
          cmd.completedAt = new Date().toISOString();
          await redis.del(KEYS.activeCommand(commandId));
          // Store in history
          await redis.lpush(KEYS.commandHistory(cmd.deviceId), JSON.stringify(cmd));
          await redis.ltrim(KEYS.commandHistory(cmd.deviceId), 0, 49); // keep last 50
          await redis.expire(KEYS.commandHistory(cmd.deviceId), 86400);
          this.emit('command:result', cmd);
          return cmd;
        }
      }
      return null;
    }

    command.status = result.exitCode === 0 || !result.exitCode ? 'completed' : 'failed';
    command.result = result;
    command.completedAt = new Date().toISOString();

    this.activeCommands.delete(commandId);
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.del(KEYS.activeCommand(commandId));
      await redis.lpush(KEYS.commandHistory(command.deviceId), JSON.stringify(command));
      await redis.ltrim(KEYS.commandHistory(command.deviceId), 0, 49);
      await redis.expire(KEYS.commandHistory(command.deviceId), 86400);
    }

    this.emit('command:result', command);
    logger.info({ commandId, status: command.status, duration: result.duration }, 'Command completed');
    return command;
  }

  private handleCommandTimeout(commandId: string) {
    const command = this.activeCommands.get(commandId);
    if (command && (command.status === 'sent' || command.status === 'executing')) {
      command.status = 'timeout';
      command.completedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      this.activeCommands.delete(commandId);
      if (isRedisConnected()) redis.del(KEYS.activeCommand(commandId)).catch(() => {});
      this.emit('command:timeout', command);
      logger.warn({ commandId, deviceId: command.deviceId }, 'Command timed out');
    }
  }

  getCommandStatus(commandId: string): DeviceCommand | undefined {
    return this.activeCommands.get(commandId);
  }

  async getCommandHistory(deviceId: string): Promise<DeviceCommand[]> {
    if (!isRedisConnected()) return [];
    try {
      const items = await redis.lrange(KEYS.commandHistory(deviceId), 0, 49);
      return items.map(i => JSON.parse(i));
    } catch { return []; }
  }

  private async flushCommandQueue(deviceId: string) {
    if (!isRedisConnected()) return;

    const key = KEYS.commandQueue(deviceId);
    const items = await redis.lrange(key, 0, -1);
    if (items.length === 0) return;

    await redis.del(key);
    logger.info({ deviceId, count: items.length }, 'Flushing persisted command queue');

    for (const item of items) {
      const command = JSON.parse(item) as DeviceCommand;
      command.status = 'sent';
      command.sentAt = new Date().toISOString();
      this.activeCommands.set(command.id, command);
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.set(KEYS.activeCommand(command.id), JSON.stringify(command), 'EX', Math.ceil(command.timeout / 1000) + 30);
      }
      this.emit('command:dispatch', command);
      setTimeout(() => this.handleCommandTimeout(command.id), command.timeout);
    }
  }

  // ─── Heartbeat Processing (Buffered Telemetry) ───────────────────────────

  async processHeartbeat(deviceId: string, tenantId: string, metrics: {
    cpuUsage?: number;
    memoryUsage?: number;
    diskUsage?: number;
    temperature?: number;
    networkIn?: number;
    networkOut?: number;
    uptime?: number;
    processCount?: number;
  }) {
    // Update in-memory state
    const device = this.connectedDevices.get(deviceId);
    if (device) {
      device.lastHeartbeat = new Date().toISOString();
      // Refresh Redis TTL
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        redis.expire(KEYS.deviceOnline(deviceId), 120).catch(() => {});
      }
    }

    // Buffer telemetry for batch insert
    this.telemetryBuffer.push({
      deviceId,
      tenantId,
      cpuUsage: metrics.cpuUsage,
      memoryUsage: metrics.memoryUsage,
      diskUsage: metrics.diskUsage,
      temperature: metrics.temperature,
      networkIn: metrics.networkIn,
      networkOut: metrics.networkOut,
      uptime: metrics.uptime,
      processCount: metrics.processCount,
    });

    // Update device last_seen (debounced via Redis)
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      const lastUpdateKey = `orch:device:lastupdate:${deviceId}`;
      const lastUpdate = await redis.get(lastUpdateKey);
      if (!lastUpdate) {
        await redis.set(lastUpdateKey, '1', 'EX', 10); // debounce 10s
        db.update(devices)
          .set({ lastSeen: new Date(), lastHeartbeat: new Date(), status: 'online' })
          .where(eq(devices.id, deviceId))
          .catch(() => {});
      }
    } else {
      db.update(devices)
        .set({ lastSeen: new Date(), lastHeartbeat: new Date(), status: 'online' })
        .where(eq(devices.id, deviceId))
        .catch(() => {});
    }

    // Check thresholds
    await this.checkThresholds(deviceId, tenantId, metrics);

    this.emit('telemetry:received', { deviceId, tenantId, metrics });

    // Return pending commands count
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      const queueLen = await redis.llen(KEYS.commandQueue(deviceId));
      return queueLen;
    }
    return 0;
  }

  // ─── Telemetry Batch Flusher ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  private startTelemetryFlusher() {
    // Flush telemetry buffer every 5 seconds
    this.flushTimer = setInterval(async () => {
      if (this.telemetryBuffer.length === 0) return;

      const batch = this.telemetryBuffer.splice(0, this.telemetryBuffer.length);
      try {
        // Batch insert
        await db.insert(telemetry).values(batch);
        logger.debug({ count: batch.length }, 'Telemetry batch flushed');
      } catch (err) {
        logger.error({ err, count: batch.length }, 'Telemetry batch insert failed');
        // Re-queue failed items (max 1000 to prevent memory leak)
        if (this.telemetryBuffer.length < 1000) {
          this.telemetryBuffer.push(...batch);
        }
      }
    }, 5000);
  }

  // ─── Telemetry Retention Cleanup ─────────────────────────────────────────

  private startRetentionCleanup() {
    const retentionDays = parseInt(process.env.TELEMETRY_RETENTION_DAYS || '7');

    // Run cleanup every hour
    this.retentionTimer = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const cutoff = new Date(Date.now() - retentionDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
        const result = await db.delete(telemetry).where(lt(telemetry.timestamp, cutoff));
        logger.info({ retentionDays, cutoff: cutoff.toISOString() }, 'Telemetry retention cleanup executed');
      } catch (err) {
        logger.error({ err }, 'Telemetry retention cleanup failed');
      }
    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // every hour

    // Also run once on startup (after 30s delay)
    setTimeout(async () => {
      try {
        const cutoff = new Date(Date.now() - retentionDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
        await db.delete(telemetry).where(lt(telemetry.timestamp, cutoff));
        logger.info({ retentionDays }, 'Initial telemetry cleanup done');
      } catch {}
    }, 30000);
  }

  // ─── Threshold Checking (with Redis dedup) ───────────────────────────────

  private async checkThresholds(deviceId: string, tenantId: string, metrics: any) {
    const thresholds = [
      { metric: 'cpuUsage', threshold: 90, title: 'High CPU Usage', severity: 'critical' as const },
      { metric: 'memoryUsage', threshold: 85, title: 'High Memory Usage', severity: 'warning' as const },
      { metric: 'diskUsage', threshold: 90, title: 'Disk Space Critical', severity: 'critical' as const },
      { metric: 'temperature', threshold: 80, title: 'High Temperature', severity: 'warning' as const },
    ];

    for (const t of thresholds) {
      if (metrics[t.metric] && metrics[t.metric] > t.threshold) {
        // Dedup via Redis (1 alert per device per metric per 5 min)
        const dedupKey = `orch:alert:dedup:${deviceId}:${t.metric}`;
        if (isRedisConnected()) {
          const exists = await redis.get(dedupKey);
          if (exists) continue; // already alerted recently
          await redis.set(dedupKey, '1', 'EX', 300); // 5 min cooldown
        }

        // Check DB for existing active alert
        const [existing] = await db.select().from(alerts)
          .where(and(eq(alerts.deviceId, deviceId), eq(alerts.title, t.title), eq(alerts.status, 'active')))
          .limit(1);

        if (!existing) {
          const [alert] = await db.insert(alerts).values({
            tenantId, deviceId,
            title: t.title,
            message: `${t.metric} at ${metrics[t.metric].toFixed(1)}% (threshold: ${t.threshold}%)`,
            severity: t.severity,
            status: 'active',
            source: 'orchestrator-threshold',
          }).returning();

          this.emit('alert:created', alert);
          logger.warn({ deviceId, metric: t.metric, value: metrics[t.metric] }, `Threshold: ${t.title}`);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  // ─── Job Execution (Async with Concurrency Control) ──────────────────────

  async executeJob(jobId: string) {
    // Acquire lock (prevent double execution)
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      const lockKey = KEYS.jobLock(jobId);
      const acquired = await redis.set(lockKey, '1', 'EX', 3600, 'NX');
      if (!acquired) {
        throw new Error('Job is already being executed');
      }
    }

    const [job] = await db.select().from(jobs).where(eq(jobs.id, jobId)).limit(1);
    if (!job) throw new Error('Job not found');

    await db.update(jobs)
      .set({ status: 'running', startedAt: new Date(), updatedAt: new Date() })
      .where(eq(jobs.id, jobId));

    this.emit('job:started', { jobId, name: job.name });
    logger.info({ jobId, name: job.name, type: job.type }, 'Job started');

    const targetDevices: string[] = Array.isArray(job.targetDevices) ? job.targetDevices : [];
    const totalTargets = targetDevices.length || 1;
    let completed = 0;
    let failed = 0;

    // Process in batches with concurrency control
    const batches = chunk(targetDevices, this.jobConcurrency);

    for (const batch of batches) {
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        batch.map(deviceId =>
          this.dispatchCommand(deviceId, job.tenantId, 'shell_execute', {
            jobId, jobType: job.type, jobName: job.name,
          })
        )
      );

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'fulfilled') completed++;
        else failed++;
      }

      const progress = Math.round(((completed + failed) / totalTargets) * 100);
      await db.update(jobs)
        .set({ progress, updatedAt: new Date() })
        .where(eq(jobs.id, jobId));

      this.emit('job:progress', { jobId, progress, completed, failed, total: totalTargets });
    }

    const finalStatus = failed === totalTargets ? 'failed' : failed > 0 ? 'completed' : 'completed';
    await db.update(jobs)
      .set({
        status: finalStatus as any,
        progress: 100,
        completedAt: new Date(),
        updatedAt: new Date(),
        result: { completed, failed, total: totalTargets },
      })
      .where(eq(jobs.id, jobId));

    // Release lock
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.del(KEYS.jobLock(jobId));
    }

    this.emit('job:completed', { jobId, status: finalStatus, completed, failed });
    logger.info({ jobId, status: finalStatus, completed, failed }, 'Job completed');
  }

  // ─── Bulk Operations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  async bulkCommand(deviceIds: string[], tenantId: string, type: DeviceCommand['type'], payload: Record<string, any>): Promise<DeviceCommand[]> {
    const results: DeviceCommand[] = [];
    // Process in parallel batches
    const batches = chunk(deviceIds, 10);
    for (const batch of batches) {
      const batchResults = await Promise.all(
        batch.map(deviceId => this.dispatchCommand(deviceId, tenantId, type, payload))
      );
      results.push(...batchResults);
    }
    this.emit('bulk:dispatched', { count: results.length, type });
    return results;
  }

  async bulkReboot(deviceIds: string[], tenantId: string) {
    return this.bulkCommand(deviceIds, tenantId, 'reboot', {});
  }

  async bulkUpdateConfig(deviceIds: string[], tenantId: string, config: Record<string, any>) {
    return this.bulkCommand(deviceIds, tenantId, 'update_config', config);
  }

  // ─── Device Shadow State (Redis-persisted) ───────────────────────────────

  async getShadowState(deviceId: string): Promise<{ desired: any; reported: any; version: number }> {
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      const cached = await redis.get(KEYS.shadow(deviceId));
      if (cached) return JSON.parse(cached);
    }
    return { desired: {}, reported: {}, version: 0 };
  }

  async updateDesiredState(deviceId: string, desired: Record<string, any>) {
    const shadow = await this.getShadowState(deviceId);
    shadow.desired = { ...shadow.desired, ...desired };
    shadow.version++;

    // Persist to Redis
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.set(KEYS.shadow(deviceId), JSON.stringify(shadow), 'EX', 86400 * 30); // 30 days
    }

    // Compute delta
    const delta: Record<string, any> = {};
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(shadow.desired)) {
      if (JSON.stringify(shadow.reported[key]) !== JSON.stringify(value)) {
        delta[key] = value;
      }
    }

    if (this.isDeviceOnline(deviceId) && Object.keys(delta).length > 0) {
      this.emit('shadow:delta', { deviceId, delta, version: shadow.version });
    }

    return { ...shadow, delta };
  }

  async updateReportedState(deviceId: string, reported: Record<string, any>) {
    const shadow = await this.getShadowState(deviceId);
    shadow.reported = { ...shadow.reported, ...reported };

    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.set(KEYS.shadow(deviceId), JSON.stringify(shadow), 'EX', 86400 * 30);
    }

    this.emit('shadow:updated', { deviceId, shadow });
    return shadow;
  }

  // ─── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getStats() {
    return {
      connectedDevices: this.connectedDevices.size,
      pendingCommands: 0, // now in Redis, check async
      activeCommands: this.activeCommands.size,
      telemetryBufferSize: this.telemetryBuffer.length,
      redisConnected: isRedisConnected(),
    };
  }

  // ─── Cleanup ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  shutdown() {
    if (this.flushTimer) clearInterval(this.flushTimer);
    if (this.retentionTimer) clearInterval(this.retentionTimer);
  }
}

// Utility
function chunk<T>(arr: T[], size: number): T[][] {
  const chunks: T[][] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i += size) {
    chunks.push(arr.slice(i, i + size));
  }
  return chunks;
}

// Singleton
export const orchestrator = new OrchestratorEngine();

// ─── AI Provider Manager ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class AIProviderManager {
  private connections = new Map<string, { apiKey: string; endpoint?: string; status: string; lastTested?: string; latency?: number }>();

  constructor() {
    // Load from env on startup
    this.loadFromEnv();
  }

  private loadFromEnv() {
    const envMappings: Record<string, string> = {
      'openai': 'OPENAI_API_KEY',
      'anthropic': 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',
      'google-gemini': 'GEMINI_API_KEY',
      'groq': 'GROQ_API_KEY',
      'deepseek': 'DEEPSEEK_API_KEY',
      'mistral': 'MISTRAL_API_KEY',
      'fireworks': 'FIREWORKS_API_KEY',
      'together': 'TOGETHER_API_KEY',
      'cohere': 'COHERE_API_KEY',
      'openrouter': 'OPENROUTER_API_KEY',
      'perplexity': 'PERPLEXITY_API_KEY',
      'cerebras': 'CEREBRAS_API_KEY',
      'sambanova': 'SAMBANOVA_API_KEY',
      'xai': 'XAI_API_KEY',
      'huggingface': 'HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY',
      'replicate': 'REPLICATE_API_KEY',
      'nvidia-nim': 'NVIDIA_API_KEY',
      'azure-openai': 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY',
      'alibaba': 'ALIBABA_API_KEY',
      'kimi': 'KIMI_API_KEY',
      'glm-china': 'GLM_API_KEY',
      'yi': 'YI_API_KEY',
      'novita-ai': 'NOVITA_API_KEY',
      'hyperbolic': 'HYPERBOLIC_API_KEY',
    };

    for (const [providerId, envKey] of Object.entries(envMappings)) {
      const key = process.env[envKey];
      if (key) {
        this.connections.set(providerId, { apiKey: key, status: 'ready' });
        logger.info({ provider: providerId }, 'AI provider loaded from env');
      }
    }
  }

  // ─── Connection Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────

  async connect(providerId: string, apiKey: string, endpoint?: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; latency?: number; error?: string }> {
    const provider = PROVIDER_CATALOG.find(p => p.id === providerId);
    if (!provider) return { success: false, error: 'Provider not found' };

    // Test connection
    const testResult = await this.testConnection(providerId, apiKey, endpoint || provider.baseUrl);

    if (testResult.success) {
      this.connections.set(providerId, {
        apiKey,
        endpoint,
        status: 'connected',
        lastTested: new Date().toISOString(),
        latency: testResult.latency,
      });

      // Persist to Redis
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.set(`ai:provider:${providerId}`, JSON.stringify({
          apiKey: this.maskKey(apiKey),
          endpoint,
          status: 'connected',
          lastTested: new Date().toISOString(),
          latency: testResult.latency,
        }), 'EX', 86400 * 30);
      }
    }

    return testResult;
  }

  async disconnect(providerId: string) {
    this.connections.delete(providerId);
    if (isRedisConnected()) {
      await redis.del(`ai:provider:${providerId}`);
    }
  }

  async testConnection(providerId: string, apiKey: string, baseUrl: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; latency?: number; error?: string; model?: string }> {
    const provider = PROVIDER_CATALOG.find(p => p.id === providerId);
    if (!provider) return { success: false, error: 'Provider not found' };

    const start = Date.now();

    try {
      // Use appropriate test method based on provider type
      if (providerId === 'ollama') {
        const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace('/v1', '')}/api/tags`, {
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        return { success: false, error: 'Ollama not running', latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'anthropic' || providerId === 'claude-code') {
        const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/messages`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'x-api-key': apiKey,
            'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', max_tokens: 5, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'hi' }] }),
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok || res.status === 429 || res.status === 400) return { success: true, latency }; // 429/400 means key is valid
        if (res.status === 401) return { success: false, error: 'Invalid API key', latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'google-gemini' || providerId === 'gemini-cli') {
        const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/models?key=${apiKey}`, {
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'cohere') {
        const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/models`, {
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        if (res.status === 401) return { success: false, error: 'Invalid API key', latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'replicate') {
        const res = await fetch('https://api.replicate.com/v1/models', {
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Token ${apiKey}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'huggingface') {
        const res = await fetch('https://huggingface.co/api/whoami-v2', {
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      if (providerId === 'xai') {
        const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/models`, {
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
        });
        const latency = Date.now() - start;
        if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
        if (res.status === 401) return { success: false, error: 'Invalid API key', latency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${res.status}`, latency };
      }

      // Default: OpenAI-compatible — try /models or /chat/completions
      const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/models`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
      });
      const latency = Date.now() - start;
      if (res.ok) return { success: true, latency };
      if (res.status === 401 || res.status === 403) return { success: false, error: 'Invalid API key', latency };
      // Some providers don't have /models — try a minimal completion
      if (res.status === 404) {
        const chatRes = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ model: provider.models[0], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'hi' }], max_tokens: 1 }),
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15000),
        });
        const chatLatency = Date.now() - start;
        if (chatRes.ok || chatRes.status === 429) return { success: true, latency: chatLatency };
        return { success: false, error: `HTTP ${chatRes.status}`, latency: chatLatency };
      }
      return { success: res.ok, latency, error: res.ok ? undefined : `HTTP ${res.status}` };

    } catch (err: any) {
      const latency = Date.now() - start;
      if (err.name === 'TimeoutError' || err.name === 'AbortError') {
        return { success: false, error: 'Connection timeout', latency };
      }
      return { success: false, error: err.message || 'Connection failed', latency };
    }
  }

  // ─── Chat Completion ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  async complete(request: AICompletionRequest): Promise<AICompletionResponse> {
    const connection = this.connections.get(request.provider);
    if (!connection) throw new Error(`Provider '${request.provider}' not connected`);

    const provider = PROVIDER_CATALOG.find(p => p.id === request.provider);
    if (!provider) throw new Error(`Provider '${request.provider}' not found`);

    const baseUrl = connection.endpoint || provider.baseUrl;
    const model = request.model || provider.models[0];
    const start = Date.now();

    try {
      let response: AICompletionResponse;

      if (request.provider === 'anthropic' || request.provider === 'claude-code') {
        response = await this.callAnthropic(connection.apiKey, baseUrl, model, request, start);
      } else if (request.provider === 'google-gemini' || request.provider === 'gemini-cli') {
        response = await this.callGemini(connection.apiKey, baseUrl, model, request, start);
      } else if (request.provider === 'cohere') {
        response = await this.callCohere(connection.apiKey, baseUrl, model, request, start);
      } else {
        // OpenAI-compatible (most providers: OpenAI, Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral, Together, Fireworks, xAI, etc.)
        response = await this.callOpenAICompatible(connection.apiKey, baseUrl, model, request, start);
      }

      // Track usage
      if (isRedisConnected()) {
        await redis.hincrby('ai:usage:tokens', request.provider, response.usage.totalTokens);
        await redis.hincrby('ai:usage:requests', request.provider, 1);
      }

      return response;
    } catch (err: any) {
      logger.error({ provider: request.provider, err: err.message }, 'AI completion failed');
      throw err;
    }
  }

  private async callOpenAICompatible(apiKey: string, baseUrl: string, model: string, request: AICompletionRequest, start: number): Promise<AICompletionResponse> {
    const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model,
        messages: request.messages,
        temperature: request.temperature ?? 0.7,
        max_tokens: request.maxTokens ?? 2048,
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const err = await res.text();
      throw new Error(`Provider error (${res.status}): ${err.slice(0, 200)}`);
    }

    const data = await res.json();
    return {
      provider: request.provider,
      model: data.model || model,
      content: data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '',
      usage: {
        promptTokens: data.usage?.prompt_tokens || 0,
        completionTokens: data.usage?.completion_tokens || 0,
        totalTokens: data.usage?.total_tokens || 0,
      },
      latency: Date.now() - start,
    };
  }

  private async callAnthropic(apiKey: string, baseUrl: string, model: string, request: AICompletionRequest, start: number): Promise<AICompletionResponse> {
    const systemMsg = request.messages.find(m => m.role === 'system');
    const messages = request.messages.filter(m => m.role !== 'system');

    const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/messages`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'x-api-key': apiKey,
        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model,
        max_tokens: request.maxTokens ?? 2048,
        system: systemMsg?.content,
        messages,
        temperature: request.temperature ?? 0.7,
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const err = await res.text();
      throw new Error(`Anthropic error (${res.status}): ${err.slice(0, 200)}`);
    }

    const data = await res.json();
    return {
      provider: request.provider,
      model: data.model || model,
      content: data.content?.[0]?.text || '',
      usage: {
        promptTokens: data.usage?.input_tokens || 0,
        completionTokens: data.usage?.output_tokens || 0,
        totalTokens: (data.usage?.input_tokens || 0) + (data.usage?.output_tokens || 0),
      },
      latency: Date.now() - start,
    };
  }

  private async callGemini(apiKey: string, baseUrl: string, model: string, request: AICompletionRequest, start: number): Promise<AICompletionResponse> {
    const contents = request.messages.filter(m => m.role !== 'system').map(m => ({
      role: m.role === 'assistant' ? 'model' : 'user',
      parts: [{ text: m.content }],
    }));

    const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${apiKey}`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        contents,
        generationConfig: { temperature: request.temperature ?? 0.7, maxOutputTokens: request.maxTokens ?? 2048 },
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const err = await res.text();
      throw new Error(`Gemini error (${res.status}): ${err.slice(0, 200)}`);
    }

    const data = await res.json();
    return {
      provider: request.provider,
      model,
      content: data.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || '',
      usage: {
        promptTokens: data.usageMetadata?.promptTokenCount || 0,
        completionTokens: data.usageMetadata?.candidatesTokenCount || 0,
        totalTokens: data.usageMetadata?.totalTokenCount || 0,
      },
      latency: Date.now() - start,
    };
  }

  // ─── Provider Listing ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

  getProviders(): (typeof PROVIDER_CATALOG[0] & { status: string; connectionCount: number; lastTested?: string; latency?: number })[] {
    return PROVIDER_CATALOG.map(p => {
      const conn = this.connections.get(p.id);
      return {
        ...p,
        status: conn?.status || 'disconnected',
        connectionCount: conn ? 1 : 0,
        lastTested: conn?.lastTested,
        latency: conn?.latency,
      };
    });
  }

  getConnectedProviders() {
    return this.getProviders().filter(p => p.status === 'connected' || p.status === 'ready');
  }

  isConnected(providerId: string): boolean {
    return this.connections.has(providerId);
  }

  async getUsageStats(): Promise<Record<string, { tokens: number; requests: number }>> {
    if (!isRedisConnected()) return {};
    const tokens = await redis.hgetall('ai:usage:tokens');
    const requests = await redis.hgetall('ai:usage:requests');
    const stats: Record<string, { tokens: number; requests: number }> = {};
    for (const [provider, count] of Object.entries(tokens)) {
      stats[provider] = { tokens: parseInt(count), requests: parseInt(requests[provider] || '0') };
    }
    return stats;
  }

  private maskKey(key: string): string {
    if (key.length <= 8) return '***';
    return key.slice(0, 4) + '...' + key.slice(-4);
  }
}

export const aiProviders = new AIProviderManager();

version: '3.8'

services:
  # ─── PostgreSQL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: orchestrator-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER:-orchestrator}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-orchestrator_secret}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME:-orchestrator}
    ports:
      - "${DB_PORT:-5433}:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U orchestrator"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M

  # ─── Redis ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: orchestrator-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru --appendonly yes
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT:-6380}:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 256M

  # ─── API Gateway ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  api-gateway:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/api-gateway/Dockerfile
    container_name: orchestrator-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${API_PORT:-3388}:3388"
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      API_PORT: 3388
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://${DB_USER:-orchestrator}:${DB_PASSWORD:-orchestrator_secret}@postgres:5432/${DB_NAME:-orchestrator}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-this-in-production}
      JWT_EXPIRATION: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:-86400}
      TELEMETRY_RETENTION_DAYS: ${TELEMETRY_RETENTION_DAYS:-7}
      CORS_ORIGINS: ${CORS_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:3387,http://localhost:5173}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://localhost:3388/api/v1/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      start_period: 15s
      retries: 3
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { db } from '../db/connection';
import { users, tenants, roles, settings, auditLogs, devices } from '../db/schema';
import { eq, ilike, and, count, desc } from 'drizzle-orm';
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';
import { adminOnly } from '../lib/rbac';
import { validate, createUserSchema, updateUserSchema, createRoleSchema, updateSettingsSchema } from '../lib/validation';

export async function adminRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  // Overview — admin only
  app.get('/overview', { preHandler: [app.authenticate, adminOnly] }, async (request) => {
    const [deviceCount] = await db.select({ count: count() }).from(devices);
    const [userCount] = await db.select({ count: count() }).from(users);
    const [tenantCount] = await db.select({ count: count() }).from(tenants);

    return {
      success: true,
      devices: Number(deviceCount.count),
      users: Number(userCount.count),
      tenants: Number(tenantCount.count),
      systemHealth: 'healthy',
      uptime: '99.7%',
      version: '2.1.0',
    };
  });

  // ─── Users Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  app.get('/users', { preHandler: [app.authenticate, adminOnly] }, async (request) => {
    const { search, role, status, page = '1' } = request.query as any;
    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
    const limit = 20;
    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limit;

    let query = db.select({
      id: users.id,
      email: users.email,
      username: users.username,
      displayName: users.displayName,
      role: users.role,
      status: users.status,
      lastLogin: users.lastLogin,
      createdAt: users.createdAt,
    }).from(users);

    // Note: simplified filtering
    const data = await query.limit(limit).offset(offset).orderBy(desc(users.createdAt));
    const [total] = await db.select({ count: count() }).from(users);

    return {
      success: true,
      data,
      total: Number(total.count),
      page: pageNum,
      totalPages: Math.ceil(Number(total.count) / limit),
    };
  });

  app.post('/users', { preHandler: [app.authenticate, adminOnly, validate(createUserSchema)] }, async (request) => {
    const body = request.body as any;
    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(body.password || 'changeme123', 10);

    // Get first tenant
    const [tenant] = await db.select().from(tenants).limit(1);

    const [user] = await db.insert(users).values({
      tenantId: tenant.id,
      email: body.email,
      username: body.username || body.email.split('@')[0],
      displayName: body.displayName,
      passwordHash,
      role: body.role || 'viewer',
      status: 'active',
    }).returning();

    return { success: true, data: { ...user, passwordHash: undefined } };
  });

  app.put('/users/:id', { preHandler: [app.authenticate, adminOnly, validate(updateUserSchema)] }, async (request) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const body = request.body as any;

    const updateData: any = { updatedAt: new Date() };
    if (body.displayName) updateData.displayName = body.displayName;
    if (body.role) updateData.role = body.role;
    if (body.status) updateData.status = body.status;

    const [user] = await db.update(users).set(updateData).where(eq(users.id, id)).returning();
    return { success: true, data: { ...user, passwordHash: undefined } };
  });

  app.delete('/users/:id', { preHandler: [app.authenticate, adminOnly] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { userId } = request.user;

    if (id === userId) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, error: 'Cannot delete yourself' });
    }

    await db.delete(users).where(eq(users.id, id));
    return { success: true, message: 'User deleted' };
  });

  // ─── Tenants Management ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  app.get('/tenants', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { page = '1' } = request.query as any;
    const data = await db.select().from(tenants);
    return { success: true, data, total: data.length, page: parseInt(page), totalPages: 1 };
  });

  app.post('/tenants', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const body = request.body as any;
    const [tenant] = await db.insert(tenants).values({
      name: body.name,
      slug: body.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-'),
      domain: body.domain,
      plan: body.plan || 'free',
      status: 'active',
    }).returning();
    return { success: true, data: tenant };
  });

  app.put('/tenants/:id', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const body = request.body as any;

    const updateData: any = { updatedAt: new Date() };
    if (body.name) updateData.name = body.name;
    if (body.plan) updateData.plan = body.plan;
    if (body.status) updateData.status = body.status;

    const [tenant] = await db.update(tenants).set(updateData).where(eq(tenants.id, id)).returning();
    return { success: true, data: tenant };
  });

  // ─── Roles Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  app.get('/roles', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;
    return db.select().from(roles).where(eq(roles.tenantId, tenantId));
  });

  app.post('/roles', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;
    const body = request.body as any;

    const [role] = await db.insert(roles).values({
      tenantId,
      name: body.name,
      description: body.description,
      permissions: body.permissions || [],
    }).returning();

    return { success: true, data: role };
  });

  app.delete('/roles/:id', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };

    const [role] = await db.select().from(roles).where(eq(roles.id, id)).limit(1);
    if (role?.isSystem) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, error: 'Cannot delete system role' });
    }

    await db.delete(roles).where(eq(roles.id, id));
    return { success: true, message: 'Role deleted' };
  });

  // ─── Settings ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  app.get('/settings', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;
    return db.select().from(settings).where(eq(settings.tenantId, tenantId));
  });

  app.put('/settings', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;
    const body = request.body as { settings: { key: string; value: string }[] };

    for (const setting of body.settings) {
      const [existing] = await db.select().from(settings)
        .where(and(eq(settings.tenantId, tenantId), eq(settings.key, setting.key)))
        .limit(1);

      if (existing) {
        await db.update(settings)
          .set({ value: setting.value, updatedAt: new Date() })
          .where(eq(settings.id, existing.id));
      } else {
        await db.insert(settings).values({
          tenantId,
          key: setting.key,
          value: setting.value,
        });
      }
    }

    return { success: true, message: 'Settings updated' };
  });

  // ─── Audit Logs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  app.get('/audit-logs', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;
    const { eventType, page = '1' } = request.query as any;

    let data;
    if (eventType) {
      data = await db.select().from(auditLogs)
        .where(and(eq(auditLogs.tenantId, tenantId), eq(auditLogs.action, eventType)))
        .orderBy(desc(auditLogs.createdAt)).limit(50);
    } else {
      data = await db.select().from(auditLogs)
        .where(eq(auditLogs.tenantId, tenantId))
        .orderBy(desc(auditLogs.createdAt)).limit(50);
    }

    return { success: true, data, total: data.length };
  });
}

import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { db } from '../db/connection';
import { alerts } from '../db/schema';
import { eq, and, count, desc } from 'drizzle-orm';

export async function alertsRoutes(app: FastifyInstance) {
  // List alerts
  app.get('/', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;

    const data = await db.select().from(alerts)
      .where(eq(alerts.tenantId, tenantId))
      .orderBy(desc(alerts.createdAt))
      .limit(100);

    return data;
  });

  // Alert stats
  app.get('/stats', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request) => {
    const { tenantId } = request.user;

    const result = await db.select({
      status: alerts.status,
      severity: alerts.severity,
      count: count(),
    }).from(alerts).where(eq(alerts.tenantId, tenantId)).groupBy(alerts.status, alerts.severity);

    const stats = { total: 0, active: 0, acknowledged: 0, resolved: 0, critical: 0, error: 0, warning: 0, info: 0 };
    for (const row of result) {
      const c = Number(row.count);
      stats.total += c;
      stats[row.status as keyof typeof stats] = (stats[row.status as keyof typeof stats] as number || 0) + c;
      stats[row.severity as keyof typeof stats] = (stats[row.severity as keyof typeof stats] as number || 0) + c;
    }

    return { success: true, ...stats };
  });

  // Acknowledge alert
  app.put('/:id/acknowledge', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { tenantId, userId } = request.user;

    const [alert] = await db.update(alerts)
      .set({ status: 'acknowledged', acknowledgedBy: userId, acknowledgedAt: new Date(), updatedAt: new Date() })
      .where(and(eq(alerts.id, id), eq(alerts.tenantId, tenantId)))
      .returning();

    if (!alert) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, error: 'Alert not found' });
    return { success: true, data: alert };
  });

  // Resolve alert
  app.put('/:id/resolve', { preHandler: [app.authenticate] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { tenantId } = request.user;

    const [alert] = await db.update(alerts)
      .set({ status: 'resolved', resolvedAt: new Date(), updatedAt: new Date() })
      .where(and(eq(alerts.id, id), eq(alerts.tenantId, tenantId)))
      .returning();

    if (!alert) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, error: 'Alert not found' });
    return { success: true, data: alert };
  });
}

/**
 * Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
 * Enforces permissions based on user role from JWT.
 * 
 * Roles hierarchy: super_admin > tenant_owner > admin > operator > viewer
 */

import { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';

export type Role = 'super_admin' | 'tenant_owner' | 'admin' | 'operator' | 'viewer';

// Role hierarchy (higher index = more permissions)
const ROLE_HIERARCHY: Role[] = ['viewer', 'operator', 'admin', 'tenant_owner', 'super_admin'];

// Permission definitions per role
const ROLE_PERMISSIONS: Record<Role, string[]> = {
  viewer: [
    'devices:read', 'alerts:read', 'jobs:read', 'telemetry:read',
    'groups:read', 'users:read', 'audit-logs:read', 'dashboard:read',
  ],
  operator: [
    'devices:read', 'devices:update', 'devices:execute',
    'alerts:read', 'alerts:acknowledge',
    'jobs:read', 'jobs:create',
    'telemetry:read',
    'groups:read',
    'users:read',
    'audit-logs:read',
    'dashboard:read',
    'orchestrator:command', 'orchestrator:read',
  ],
  admin: [
    'devices:*', 'alerts:*', 'jobs:*', 'telemetry:*',
    'groups:*', 'users:read', 'users:update',
    'audit-logs:read',
    'dashboard:*',
    'orchestrator:*',
    'settings:read', 'settings:update',
  ],
  tenant_owner: [
    '*:*', // all permissions within tenant
  ],
  super_admin: [
    '*', // global admin
  ],
};

/**
 * Check if a role has a specific permission
 */
export function hasPermission(role: Role, permission: string): boolean {
  const permissions = ROLE_PERMISSIONS[role] || [];

  // Super admin and tenant owner have wildcard
  if (permissions.includes('*') || permissions.includes('*:*')) return true;

  // Check exact match
  if (permissions.includes(permission)) return true;

  // Check wildcard match (e.g., 'devices:*' matches 'devices:read')
  const [resource] = permission.split(':');
  if (permissions.includes(`${resource}:*`)) return true;

  return false;
}

/**
 * Check if roleA is at least as privileged as roleB
 */
export function isRoleAtLeast(roleA: Role, roleB: Role): boolean {
  return ROLE_HIERARCHY.indexOf(roleA) >= ROLE_HIERARCHY.indexOf(roleB);
}

/**
 * Fastify preHandler: require minimum role
 */
export function requireRole(...allowedRoles: Role[]) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    const user = request.user;
    if (!user) {
      return reply.status(401).send({ success: false, error: 'Unauthorized' });
    }

    const userRole = user.role as Role;

    // Super admin always passes
    if (userRole === 'super_admin') return;

    // Check if user's role is in allowed list
    if (allowedRoles.includes(userRole)) return;

    // Check hierarchy — if user's role is higher than any allowed role
    const minRequired = allowedRoles.reduce((min, role) => {
      const idx = ROLE_HIERARCHY.indexOf(role);
      return idx < ROLE_HIERARCHY.indexOf(min) ? role : min;
    }, allowedRoles[0]);

    if (isRoleAtLeast(userRole, minRequired)) return;

    return reply.status(403).send({
      success: false,
      error: 'Forbidden: insufficient permissions',
      required: allowedRoles,
      current: userRole,
    });
  };
}

/**
 * Fastify preHandler: require specific permission
 */
export function requirePermission(permission: string) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    const user = request.user;
    if (!user) {
      return reply.status(401).send({ success: false, error: 'Unauthorized' });
    }

    const userRole = user.role as Role;

    if (!hasPermission(userRole, permission)) {
      return reply.status(403).send({
        success: false,
        error: `Forbidden: missing permission '${permission}'`,
        current: userRole,
      });
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Shorthand preHandlers
 */
export const adminOnly = requireRole('admin', 'tenant_owner', 'super_admin');
export const operatorUp = requireRole('operator', 'admin', 'tenant_owner', 'super_admin');
export const viewerUp = requireRole('viewer', 'operator', 'admin', 'tenant_owner', 'super_admin');
